tools.name: s3Outposts.createEndpoint
tools.description:
Creates an endpoint and associates it with the specified Outpost.

It can take up to 5 minutes for this action to finish.

Related actions include:

  • DeleteEndpoint

  • ListEndpoints

tools.name: s3Outposts.deleteEndpoint
tools.description:
Deletes an endpoint.

It can take up to 5 minutes for this action to finish.

Related actions include:

  • CreateEndpoint

  • ListEndpoints

tools.name: s3Outposts.listEndpoints
tools.description:
Lists endpoints associated with the specified Outpost.

Related actions include:

  • CreateEndpoint

  • DeleteEndpoint

tools.name: s3Outposts.listOutpostsWithS3
tools.description: Lists the Outposts with S3 on Outposts capacity for your Amazon Web Services account. Includes S3 on Outposts that you have access to as the Outposts owner, or as a shared user from Resource Access Manager (RAM).

tools.name: s3Outposts.listSharedEndpoints
tools.description:
Lists all endpoints associated with an Outpost that has been shared by Amazon Web Services Resource Access Manager (RAM).

Related actions include:

  • CreateEndpoint

  • DeleteEndpoint

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
